series_metadata.series_title: Domestic Violence Incident Statistics and Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Pursuant to ORC 3113.32, local law enforcement submit monthly summaries of domestic violence incident statistics, which are then used to create an annual statistical report. The monthly summaries include statistical information about the number of domestic violence incidents reported to local law enforcement, types of charges (if any) stemming from the incidents, relationships of the parties involved, types of resulting injuries, ethnicity, age, and gender.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 10 years from final report publication and fulfillment of ORC 149.11 requirements. ; Paper: Retain 10 years from final report publication and fulfillment of ORC 149.11 requirements, unless scanned and saved electronically., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
